title: fraxinus excelsior var. coriariifolia
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. coriariifolia, also known as the Ash tree, is a lesser-known variant of the European Ash (Fraxinus excelsior) tree, characterized by its distinctive coriariifolia leaf shape. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior var. coriariifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
